creator: fbsd1@a1poweruser.com
text:
PC hard drive has FreeBSD installed previous from CD 
(IE disc1.iso) burned to CD.
Have installed FreeBSD to USB stick from CD as full running system.  Not
loaded with fixit image.

Booting from install CD with USB stick plugged in, see USB stick light
flashing while FreeBSD is loading from CD. Select fixit from sysinstall
main menu and then selecting USB file system option #3. Sysinstall
replies with window saying no USB device. Return to sysinstall main menu
select option/re-scan. Highlight re-scan and hit space bar. Screen
flickers once. Return to fixit/option #3 same results.
